attributes.action: Increase NHS funding to reduce waiting lists and improve patient care
attributes.additional_details: Many children and young people wait months or even years for CAMHS support and autism (ASD) assessments. These delays can worsen mental health, increase stress for families, and affect education and daily life. The Government should provide additional NHS funding to recruit more specialists, expand services, and reduce waiting lists so that young people can access the support and diagnoses they need in a timely manner.
attributes.background: Increase NHS funding to reduce waiting times for CAMHS and autism (ASD) assessments. Children and young people should be able to access mental health support and diagnostic services promptly, preventing delays that can negatively affect their wellbeing, education and development.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition

Fund improved CAMHS and crisis support, and cut waiting times
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759345
